article_title: Bylaw 14743 — Housing Agreement (3460 Kalyk Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in affordable senior rental units at 3460 Kalyk Avenue under new housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council approved a housing agreement with Jubilee Multi Generational Housing Society, legally binding the developer to keep a set number of units as affordable rentals for low-income seniors at a new six-storey building on Kalyk Avenue.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review whether a similar housing agreement applies to your development.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14743 — Housing Agreement (3460 Kalyk Avenue) Bylaw 2025
